## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO efforts, and team updates.](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team changes: Aida transitioning to new role, Jessalynn joining as new managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Content review process streamlined with new Airtable status updates](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
  - [Jakub working on no-index pages and redirects, collaboration needed on redirect targets](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [GrowthX developing AI/LLM strategy for content optimization and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates and Transitions

  - [Jessalynn Jones introduced as new managing editor at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Aida transitioning to client onboarding role over several weeks](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Gradual handover process to ensure smooth transition](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

### Content Review and Publishing

  - [Four blogs published to Flosum website](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [New Airtable assignment status "reviewed by Flosum" added for easier tracking](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Team to notify GrowthX of recurring edits to improve polishing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Matt to handle URL redirects for updated blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

### SEO and Technical Improvements

  - [Jakub working on no-index pages and redirects:](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
      - [2,000 no-index pages, 1,500 with 404 errors](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [190 pages with traffic in last 16 months prioritized for redirects](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [Collaboration needed on identifying correct redirect targets](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Matt can implement wildcard redirects in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Potential addition of a resources page to improve site structure](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

### AI and LLM Strategy

  - [GrowthX developing beta platform for AI/LLM content optimization and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Flosum selected as early participant in this initiative](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Discussion on best practices for LLM-friendly content:](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
      - [Summarizing articles with clear questions](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
      - [Using bullet points for skimmability](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
      - [Implementing schema markup in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)

### Content Distribution and "Surround Sound" SEO

  - [Emphasis on expanding Flosum's presence beyond owned website](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Strategies to appear in Reddit, Quora, Spotify, and review sites](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Importance of diverse marketing efforts for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/h43o2PKzFcPj8F3JE_iCFavDbkgq92sx?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
